title: fix deprecation of clear_objs_and_retain_memory by replacing with free_memory in train_cogvideox_lora.py
body:
The diffusers API clear_objs_and_retain_memory has been deprecated in favor of free_memory. This PR updates the LoRA training script to use the new API and maintain memory hygiene after validation.

What this changes:
- Replaces clear_objs_and_retain_memory([pipe]) with the new free_memory usage in the validation path.
- Updates imports to use the new API (diffusers.training_utils.free_memory).
- Adds a small compatibility approach (try free_memory with a list, fallback to a single object) to guard against minor API version differences.

Why this is safe:
- The change is isolated to memory cleanup after validation; it does not modify the training loop, model loading, or data processing semantics.
- Memory management is important for large video models; aligning with the latest diffusers API reduces future breakage and improves compatibility with newer Diffusers versions.

Suggested checks:
- Run a quick validation sampling cycle to ensure that generated pipelines are freed without errors.
- Verify that no references to clear_objs_and_retain_memory remain in the file after the change.
- Confirm compatibility across at least two diffusers versions (old and new) if target environments vary.

step_plan.summary: This PR updates the log_validation memory cleanup in train_cogvideox_lora.py to use the new diffusers.free_memory API and adds a compatibility wrapper to handle version differences, ensuring memory hygiene after validation.

steps.operation: Refactor memory cleanup in log_validation to use diffusers.training_utils.free_memory with a compatibility wrapper
steps.reason: The DIFFUSERS API clear_objs_and_retain_memory has been deprecated in favor of free_memory. Update imports to use the new API and guard against signature differences across versions by attempting a list input first and falling back to a single object if needed.
steps.side_effects: Memory cleanup behavior will be delegated to diffusers' free_memory; requires CI smoke tests to confirm no memory leaks and that no references to clear_objs_and_retain_memory remain; downstream code should not rely on the old API signature. May necessitate updating or validating tests that assume the old call signature.
